coaching.headline: A clean 30-minute stomp — objectives 24–9, towers 10–4, three big individual games on top of total map control.
coaching.team: Everything clicked: you took the Fangtooths (20, 26), out-towered them 10-4, and The Fey/Serath/Eden all popped. This is the dominant version of your team — objectives 24-9 converted straight to structures.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Nothing needed — repeat the objective-to-tower conversion that took you to 24-9 neutrals and a 10-4 tower lead.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: The Fey mid (10/2/11) into a favored Howitzer — a carry-grade game that anchored the stomp.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Serath jungle (11/5/12) — dominant; controlled neutrals and the tempo of the 24-9 objective lead.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Zinx support, 10 assists — comfortable enabling in a stomp.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Shinbi offlane (4/2/8), low-death — note you went Megacosm/Lifebinder over the Orb-of-Growth core here; the win covered it.
